## Checklist before merging

- [ ] Copied `projects/_template/` to `projects/{slug}/`
- [ ] Filled all YAML front-matter fields in README.md (including `retirement_condition`)
- [ ] Filled all CHARTER.md sections (especially Retirement Condition — not TODO)
- [ ] Charter validator passes in CI
- [ ] Founding cell has approved
